hero.title: Ifomu Elisha Lobuhlakani
hero.lead: I-Helexa iyinethiwekhi ye-AI ezihlela yona uqobo, esekelwa ngabadlali abazimele. Ivulekile. Isakazekile. Iyaguquka.
hero.subcopy: Yakhelwe abadlali, abakhi, nemiphakathi ekholwa ukuthi i-AI kufanele ibe evulekile, iqine, futhi yabelwane ngayo.

intent.title: Kungani i-Helexa Ikhona
intent.p1: I-AI isiba isakhiwo esinamandla kunazo zonke emhlabeni. Kodwa namuhla, la mandla agxile ezinkampanini ezimbalwa, enzelwe izinqumo zangasese, imingcele yendawo, nezomnotho ezibucayi.
intent.bullet1: Uhlakaniphile olukhula luvela yonke indawo, hhayi endaweni eyodwa kuphela.
intent.bullet2: Inethiwekhi lapho noma ubani angafaka isandla futhi azuze khona.
intent.bullet3: Uhlelo oluzivumelanisa nesidingo, hhayi neziqondiso ezivela phezulu.
intent.bullet4: Ubuchwepheshe obuqinisa imiphakathi kunokuba buyifake esikhundleni.
intent.closing:
I-Helexa akuyona ipulatifomu. Akusona “ifu”.
Yinethiwekhi — uhlobo oluphilayo, olusha, olwakhiwe abadlali abazimele abakhela uhlobo olusha lobuhlakani.

whyNow.title: Iphuzu Lokushintsha le-AI
whyNow.problemBullet1: I-AI iyagxila ngokushesha kakhulu kunanoma iyiphi enye ubuchwepheshe obake babakhona.
whyNow.problemBullet2: Ukufinyelela emandleni okucubungula kuyakwazi ukunquma amakhono, futhi lokho kufinyelela kuya kuncipha.
whyNow.problemBullet3: Izindleko ziphoqa ososayensi, amabhizinisi amasha, nemiphakathi ukuba bahlale ngaphandle.
whyNow.problemBullet4: Ingcindezi yezombusazwe nemithetho ingasongela ukufinyelela komhlaba wonke.
whyNow.problemBullet5: Abakhi bamamodeli nabadlali bezinsiza bavame ukungabi yingxenye yenani abazalayo.
whyNow.opportunityBullet1: Izinkulungwane zama-GPU emhlabeni wonke azisetshenziswa ngokuphelele njengamanje.
whyNow.opportunityBullet2: Abadlali bafuna ukukhokhelwa ngendlela efanele ngomsebenzi wabo wokucubungula.
whyNow.opportunityBullet3: Abathuthukisi bafuna ingqalasizinda evulekile, emelana nokucindezelwa.
whyNow.opportunityBullet4: Imiphakathi ifuna ubukhosi nokumelana nezinselelo ohlelweni lwayo lwedijithali.
whyNow.opportunityBullet5: Ukukhula kwe-AI kudlule izinkundla zakudala “zefu” — kudingeka izimo ezintsha.
whyNow.opportunityClosing: I-Helexa yileso sikhathi lapho la mandla ehambisana khona.

operators.title: Noma ubani anganikela ngamandla e-compute.
operators.body: Abadlali basebenzisa ama-node e-Helexa. Bona banquma ukuthi yimaphi amamodeli abazowamukela. Bahlala besenkonzweni yawo womabili amathuluzi abo nomnotho wabo. Azikho izigunyazo, azikho izivimbeli ezisesangweni.

routing.title: Isidingo sidlula ngaphakathi kwenethiwekhi.
routing.body: I-Helexa ifunda ukuthi kuphi lapho kukhona amandla akhululekile, kuphi lapho isidingo sikhula khona, futhi yimaphi ama-node afaneleka kakhulu ukuphendula izicelo. Inethiwekhi iyavumelana ngokwemvelo — njengama-helix akhula njalo.

value.title: Umsebenzi uyabonakala. Inkokhelo ilingana.
value.body: Umsebenzi ngamunye uphethe irisidi ye-cryptographic. Abadlali bathola imali ngohlakanipho abasiza ukululethela umhlaba. Akukho “intela yeplatifomu”. Akukho ukubalwa kwezindleko okungacacile.

distributed.title: Isatshalaliswe Ngokuklanywa
distributed.body: Akunamgogodla owodwa wephutha. Akukho gunya elilodwa elisemqoka. Inethiwekhi eqina nsuku zonke njengoba kwengezwa umdlali omusha ngamunye.

participation.title: Ukubamba Iqhaza Okuvulekile
participation.body: Uma unamandla e-compute, ungafaka isandla. Inethiwekhi yamukele wonke umuntu — kusukela kumadivayisi asemaphethelweni, kuya kumaseva asekhaya, kuya emapulazini edatha.

fairness.title: Ubulungisa Nobala
fairness.body: Imali engenayo isekelwe emsebenzini wangempela, oqinisekiswe nge-cryptography. Azikho iziqukathi eziyimfihlo. Azikho izimali ezifihlekile.

evolving.title: Uhlakanipho Oluguqukayo
evolving.body: Inethiwekhi ifunda kusuka esidingweni. Amamodeli alayishwa lapho edingeka khona. Uhlakanipho lusabalala ngokubambisana.

roadAhead.title: Lokho I-Helexa Ehlosile Ukuba Yikho
roadAhead.p1: Ungqimba lobuhlakani bomhlaba wonke obungelabo bonke abantu, obusekelwa i-helix yama-node nemiphakathi.
roadAhead.p2: Inethiwekhi emelana nokuma phansi, ezombusazwe, ama-monopoly, nokwehluleka.
roadAhead.p3: Uhlobo olusha lomnotho lapho abadlali, abakhi, nabasetshenziswa bonke bezuza khona.
roadAhead.p4: Ukuhlalisana kwemvelo lapho ukusungula okusha kukhula kusukela emaphethelweni — hhayi emaphakathi.

card.title: Uhambo Oluya Enethiwikhi Yobuhlakani Ebambene
card.body: I-Helexa isesigabeni sokuqala. Imibono mikukhulu kunezinto ezivele zisetshenzisiwe — lokho kwenziwe ngenhloso. Inethiwekhi izokhula kancane kancane, abadlali nabakhi beqopha indlela yokuziphendukela kwayo.

joinMesh.title: Inethiwekhi Iyazakha.
joinMesh.lead: Noma ngabe uphethe amathuluzi, wakha amamodeli, noma ukhathazekile ngokuthi i-AI ilawulwa kanjani, kunendawo yakho kule nethiwekhi.
joinMesh.footer: Azikho izingadi ezivalekile. Akekho umnikazi oyedwa. Kungumthungo wabantu, amathuluzi, nemicabango — okuhlanganisa ikusasa elihlukile lobuhlakani.
